name: Jumpcloud Active Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects active jumpcloud accounts that do not meet MFA requirements.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name FROM jumpcloud_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.activated, true) = true AND COALESCE(u.suspended, false) = false AND COALESCE(u.mfa_enabled, false) = false
remediation: Require MFA enrollment and enforcement for all active accounts.
